title: A faithful MUMPS 76 anniversary implementation – the original NoSQL DB
abstract: Feeling nostalgic for an old-school database? Show HN presents a faithful MUMPS 76 anniversary implementation – the original NoSQL DB! This isn't just any tool; it satisfies your retro cravings while offering modern functionality. Dive in and experience the thrill of the past in your applications today!
abstract_zh: 你还在为找不到那个老古董级别的数据库而烦恼吗？来吧，Show HN给你带来一个忠实的MUMPS 76周年复现版——原始NoSQL数据库！这可不是普通的工具，它不仅能满足你的怀旧情结，还能让你在现代应用中大展身手。快来体验一下回到过去的快感吧！
